captions: click the icon to the left of the rx card icon
select item next to rx card item
turn off the item next to the my meds item
open the icon to the right of my meds item
tap app below the ipharmacy official information icon

2197], "visibility": "visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 698, 1440, 2113], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": true, "children": [{"text": "iPharmacy
Official information of the most commonly prescribed drugs of 2014 are now available in your hand. Contents for drugs are solely from US Food and Drug Administration (FDA).  For each drug, its trade name, active ingredient, indications, usage and description are provided as your reference. Additionally, detailed drug information, such as warnings, contraindication and pharmacology, are also accessible in PDF format.
iPharmacy also provides 20,000+ commonly prescribed Rx and OTC National Drug Code (NDC). We are looking forward to adding more drugs (as long as they have been approved by FDA) and more features. Please visit www.medconnections.com or email to support@medconnections.com for more information.

Disclaimer
iPharmacy application and its owners are not affiliated with FDA. All information presented by the application is for educational purpose solely.
